participant.partner_comment: My partner was careful to be exact in choosing the right basket image.
participant.partner_human_vs_ai_why: I'd like to think that the partner was a human, but I know with live interactions with other Prolific participants, some people drop out of the study before it ends. This was a long study and there was no safeguard that I saw that would be an "out" in case one person dropped out. The partner did act like a human until the very end when the partner was effusive in praising my descriptions. That one part seemed like AI. Otherwise, my main reason for thinking it was AI was just the survey logistics.

referential_task.4.player.partner_commen: My partner was careful to be exact in choosing the right basket image.
referential_task.4.player.partner_human_: I'd like to think that the partner was a human, but I know with live interactions with other Prolific participants, some people drop out of the study before it ends. This was a long study and there was no safeguard that I saw that would be an "out" in case one person dropped out. The partner did act like a human until the very end when the partner was effusive in praising my descriptions. That one part seemed like AI. Otherwise, my main reason for thinking it was AI was just the survey logistics.

participant.partner_comment: I think they did a good job understanding my instructions, but began to over think it a little bit as time went on. But once they started asking questions and we went back and forth a little more they gained confidence and we started getting it right. They did better and better with each round too.
participant.partner_human_vs_ai_why: They were behaving like a human. AI would go way faster, unless it was specifically designed to try to trick a person into thinking they're a human and not an AI. An AI would have an easier time getting the right answers and also asking questions more often to try to figure out the answers more quickly and efficiently.

referential_task.4.player.partner_commen: I'm sorry but we were having just too much fun. My partner did really well and was very entertaining to work with!
referential_task.4.player.partner_human_: I don't know. We were chatting and chatting and while it didn't feel like AI, I started wondering if I was chatting with AI.

participant.partner_comment: I was a little worried on the first round, because they gave some details, but then left out some others. But things picked up by 2nd round. By the 3rd round, we were MUCH faster, and could work together faster. They did great, I think!
participant.partner_human_vs_ai_why: I think it was a human. Never thought about it being AI, so I had to take a moment to think about it. I guess AI can make spelling mistakes, too. The "creepy hamster" phrase made me think it was a human, though

referential_task.4.player.partner_human_: I think it was a human. Never thought about it being AI, so I had to take a moment to think about it. I guess AI can make spelling mistakes, too. The "creepy hamster" phrase made me think it was a human, though

participant.partner_comment: My partner did awesome. My partner seemed a bit shy at first but once we got to understanding how we communicate and came up with a plan, it went so well and we got all of it right. I am very proud of my partner and I! :)
participant.partner_human_vs_ai_why: I think the person was human because I would feel disappointed if it was AI because the responses felt so real and unique to their true life experience that it didn't feel fake.
